figures.caption: Table 2. Comparison with state-of-the-art trackers. OneTrackerV2 outperforms existing methods across 5 tasks and 12 benchmarks with a single training process, unified architecture, and shared parameters. We also compare whether each method supports multimodal inputs (MultiModal), employs a unified parameter (Unified Param), and is trained with a single step (Onestep Training).

Table 3. Comparison on missing-modality benchmarks. We evaluate OneTrackerV2 and existing RGB+X trackers under scenarios where certain modalities are absent. Thanks to the proposed Meta Merger, OneTrackerV2 consistently outperforms prior methods, demonstrating superior robustness to modality missing in multimodal tracking.
